description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish and a modular design. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent suppressor attached to the barrel. The rifle has a rail system on the upper receiver, supporting a mounted scope for enhanced aiming accuracy. A visible grenade or projectile is positioned near the barrel, suggesting compatibility with under-barrel launchers or accessories. The overall construction appears robust, with polymer and metal components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, scope, and detachable magazine, featuring a modular rail system and a visible projectile accessory.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, suppressor, scope, and a projectile accessory near the barrel.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the barrel alignment and the suppressor's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the collapsible stock, scope, suppressor, and the projectile accessory from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the barrel, suppressor, and the alignment of the upper rail and scope.
